products.description: 8000 DPI optical sensor. 6 programmable buttons. 16.8M color RGB. Ambidextrous design. Ultra-light 85g.

products.description: Ultra-slim low-profile mechanical switches. Full-size layout. Quiet typing experience. Per-key RGB backlight.

products.name: A4Tech Bloody A70 Neon

products.description: 7.1 virtual surround sound. Retractable noise-canceling microphone. Plush protein leather ear cups. USB powered.

products.name: Philips 24E1N1300A Monitor
products.description: 23.8-inch FHD IPS panel. 100Hz refresh rate. 4ms response time. HDMI + VGA. Eye comfort certified.
